dialogueChunks.intro: The area around {quest_focus_the} is more contested than expected. The {enemy_type_plural} have established a presence {location_hint} and are not giving ground easily.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Your efforts to {quest_action} scattered the first wave, but reinforcements have moved in. {quest_ally} estimates there are even more creatures than before. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} depending on you pushing through this resistance.
dialogueChunks.outro: Fight through them. We are too close to turn back now.

dialogueChunks.intro: The first push was not enough, {player_name}. {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type_plural} have regrouped deeper in their territory {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} warned that the creatures are more dangerous the closer you get to {quest_focus_the}. The ones near the surface were scouts: the real threat is further in. {quest_stakes_The} remains out of reach until the path is clear.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get out there and cut through their defenses. Time is not on our side.

dialogueChunks.intro: A complication: {target_npc} says another group is also after {quest_focus_the}. They sent their own fighters, and it stirred the {enemy_type_plural} into a frenzy.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The area {location_hint} is now a battlefield. The creatures are attacking anything that moves, including each other. {quest_ally} says we can use the chaos to our advantage, but only if someone pushes through and kills the strongest ones while they are distracted.
dialogueChunks.outro: Strike while the {enemy_type_plural} are divided. {quest_stakes_The} cannot wait for negotiations.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {enemy_type_plural} you drove off are back, and they brought company. The path to {quest_focus_the} is blocked again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says a larger pack has claimed the territory {location_hint}. They are more organized than the last group: sentries posted, patrols running. Breaking through will require more force this time. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} still at stake.
dialogueChunks.outro: Destroy their patrols and break their formation. Once their defenses collapse, {quest_focus_the} is within reach.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something changed since your last foray, {player_name}. The {enemy_type_plural} near {quest_focus_the} are behaving differently.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} noticed they are not just defending the area anymore: they are actively expanding their territory {location_hint}. If we do not push them back now, they will cut off every approach to {quest_focus_the}. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} slipping away.
dialogueChunks.outro: Hit them hard before they spread further. Every route they close is one less chance for us.

dialogueChunks.intro: The deeper you push toward {quest_focus_the}, the harder it gets. {quest_ally} was not exaggerating about the danger.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You cleared the outer perimeter, but the {enemy_type_plural} deeper in {location_hint} are larger and more aggressive. {target_npc} thinks they are protecting a nesting site, which means they will fight to the death. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} just past their territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: One final push. Kill everything between you and {quest_focus_the}.
